text:
## Assessment: REVISE

Existing workspace tests pass, but PRD 0006 is not implemented.

Blocking evidence:

- `crates/sembla-runtime/src/lib.rs` has no executor module.
- No `run_tick`, `run`, `TickReport`, conflict resolution, double-write backstop, or saturation diagnostic exists.
- Runtime tests cover only evaluator, RNG, and state behavior; acceptance criteria 2–7 have no tests.
- `crates/sembla-cli/src/main.rs` supports only `--version` and `validate`, not `sembla run`.
- The untracked `plan.md` is a proposed implementation plan, not executable code.

```json
{"assessment":"REVISE","blockingIssues":["crates/sembla-runtime has no executor module, run_tick/run APIs, TickReport, race sampling, conflict resolution, effect application, double-write backstop, or saturation diagnostics.","Acceptance tests 2-7 are absent: no analytic hazard, 50-tick determinism, RaceTime/Key conflict, tie-break, double-write, or saturation-warning coverage exists.","crates/sembla-cli/src/main.rs supports only validate/--version; the required sembla run command and CLI integration test are absent."],"summary":"Existing workspace tests pass, but they cover only PRDs through 0005. PRD 0006 is represented only by an untracked plan.md; no executor implementation or required runtime/CLI tests exist."}
```

blockingIssues: crates/sembla-runtime has no executor module, run_tick/run APIs, TickReport, race sampling, conflict resolution, effect application, double-write backstop, or saturation diagnostics.
Acceptance tests 2-7 are absent: no analytic hazard, 50-tick determinism, RaceTime/Key conflict, tie-break, double-write, or saturation-warning coverage exists.
crates/sembla-cli/src/main.rs supports only validate/--version; the required sembla run command and CLI integration test are absent.

## Assessment: REVISE

Existing workspace tests pass, but PRD 0006 is not implemented.

Blocking evidence:

- `crates/sembla-runtime/src/lib.rs` has no executor module.
- No `run_tick`, `run`, `TickReport`, conflict resolution, double-write backstop, or saturation diagnostic exists.
- Runtime tests cover only evaluator, RNG, and state behavior; acceptance criteria 2–7 have no tests.
- `crates/sembla-cli/src/main.rs` supports only `--version` and `validate`, not `sembla run`.
- The untracked `plan.md` is a proposed implementation plan, not executable code.
